leadText: Aura Wheel (Japanese: オーラぐるま Aura Wheel) is a damage-dealing Electric-type move introduced in Generation VIII. It is the signature move of Morpeko.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 Generation VIII 1.1.1 Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl 1.2 Generation IX 1.2.1 Pokémon Legends: Z-A Effect [ edit | edit source ] Aura Wheel inflicts damage and raises the user's Speed stat by one stage. Its type changes depending on Morpeko's current mode . Electric-type in Full Belly Mode. Dark-type in Hangry Mode. The user's Speed stat will not be raised if the attack misses or the target is immune to or protected from the move. Aura Wheel can only be successfully used by Morpeko (or a Pokémon that has transformed into Morpeko). If this move is used by any other Pokémon, such as through Mimic , the move will fail, displaying the battle text " But can't use the move! " Generation VIII [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl [ edit | edit source ] Aura Wheel cannot be selected in a battle. Generation IX [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Legends: Z-A [ edit | edit source ] Morpeko will now change forms every time it uses Aura Wheel.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Sw Sh LA Morpeko attacks and raises its Speed with the energy stored in its cheeks. This move's type changes depending on the user's form. BD SP This move can't be used. It's recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can't be remembered. S V Morpeko attacks and boosts its Speed stat with the energy stored in its cheeks. This move's type changes depending on the user's form. ZA The user attacks with energy from its cheeks, increasing its movement speed and boosting its Attack stat for a short time. This move's type changes based on Morpeko's form.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] This move's animation is a reference to hamster wheels. In Pokémon Scarlet and Violet , Aura Wheel is the only move that can be copied by Sketch but not be used by Smeargle .
